chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D — 1814 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.05.2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF M.A. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Shahnawaz Brohi Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro A.A.G. along with Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad and SIP Aftab Ahmed Memon I.O. Crime No.130/2022. ---- Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioner No.1 has appeared before the S.H.O. of the concerned Police Station and recorded her statement on the basis of which challan under ‘C’ class was presented. Since the challan has already been submitted and petitioner was satisfied with such exercise, the purpose of this petition has been served. They only seek that protection be provided to the petitioners. Accordingly the concerned officials / S.H.O. shall provide protection to the life and liberty of the petitioners in accordance with law. The petition disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE A.
